# lspci -xxxs 01:02.0

 
01:02.0 Ethernet controller: Realtek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. RTL-8100/8101L/8139 PCI Fast Ethernet Adapter (rev 10)
00: ec 10 39 81 07 00 90 02 10 00 00 02 00 40 00 00
10: 01 c1 00 00 00 08 00 e0 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 71 10 11 80
30: 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 0b 01 20 40
40: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
50: 01 00 c2 f7 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
60: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
70: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
80: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
90: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
a0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
b0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
c0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
d0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
e0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
f0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
